Profile

About Me

Profile Summary

Project Manager and Digital Transformation Consultant with 17+ years in SFA, DMS, ERP integrations, and enterprise platform rollouts.

Delivered programs for Amul, Philips, MDH, L'Oreal, Samsung, Godrej, J&J, GSK, Nivea, Marico, Dabur, V-Guard, Legrand, Valvoline Cummins, Tata Motors, Honda, Mahindra, Amaron, and Anmol Industries.

Core Strengths

Solution consulting, stakeholder management, Agile delivery, data migration, user adoption, and post-go-live stabilization — at the intersection of business strategy & technology.
